scripts.dev: lsof -ti:1530 -ti:1531 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; if [ -f .env.app ]; then set -a; . ./.env.app; set +a; fi; pnpm -r --filter tauri dev
scripts.start: lsof -ti:1530 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; if [ -f .env.app ]; then set -a; . ./.env.app; set +a; fi; { PORT=1530 ./target/release/mhaoltube server & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BACKEND_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; echo 'Waiting for backend on port 1530...'; until curl -s http://localhost:1530/api/ytdl/status > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Backend ready.'; pnpm -r --filter frontend preview; }
scripts.dev:backend: if [ -f .env.app ]; then set -a; . ./.env.app; set +a; fi; PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaoltube -- server
scripts.build: cargo build --release -p mhaoltube && pnpm -r --filter frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm -r run test && cargo test -p mhaoltube
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaoltube
scripts.install:deps: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev
